name: smeargate_bigram
why: SmearGate blends each token with its predecessor (learned sigmoid gate). BigramHash adds a 4096-bucket hash table for token-pair context projected to model_dim. Together they inject cheap bigram features the model cannot learn in 10 minutes of training. Used by 7 of top 10 submissions.
validates: Better val_bpb at matched wallclock despite ~524K extra params.
falsifies: The extra parameters hurt quantization more than the bigram features help.
notes: SmearGate: ~512 params. BigramHash: ~524K params (4096x128 embed + 128x512 proj).
Both init to near-zero so they start as near no-ops and learn during training.
Watch artifact size: extra params should still fit in 16MB with int8+zlib.
